description_long: This kiosk consists of two main booth-like structures with curved, slightly overhanging roofs in teal and gray, flanked by blue side panels. The front features prominent signage areas: one with a digital display and another with a logo panel, both set above small counter-like extensions. The rear of the kiosks is plain, with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing a closed-back design. The overall form is compact and modular, with clean lines and a modern, functional appearance. The materials appear to be a combination of metal, plastic, and glass, giving the kiosks a sturdy yet contemporary look. The color palette is dominated by teal, blue, gray, and white, contributing to a professional and inviting urban presence.
description: A pair of modern, curved-roof kiosks with digital and logo signage, blue side panels, and compact, closed-back designs in teal, blue, gray, and white.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved roofs, blue side panels, and the depth of the kiosk structures.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the digital display, logo signage, and counter-like extensions on both kiosks.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the curved roofs and blue side panels, with the kiosks' depth visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain, closed backs of the kiosks with no visible signage or openings.
attribute_signage_type: Digital display and printed logo sign, both front-facing above counter extensions; digital display shows text, logo panel displays 'LOGO'.
attribute_roof_design: Curved, slightly overhanging roofs in teal and gray, smooth finish, no visible skylights or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, minimalist with clean lines and functional design.
